requirements.summary: Build responsive SPA with state-based navigation, AuthContext for user management, localStorage auth persistence, and blue-to-indigo gradient theme
acceptanceCriteria: A single React app renders all pages via useState-controlled page routing.
AuthContext is accessible to all components and reflects the current user role.
Refreshing the page restores the logged-in user from localStorage.
Blue (#3B82F6) to Indigo (#6366F1) gradient is used as the primary color theme.

file_operations.description: Create AuthContext with currentUser state (role: student | recruiter | admin | null), login/logout methods, and localStorage persistence under key 'internbridge_currentUser'. Provide AuthProvider component.

Wrap app with AuthProvider and implement state-based page routing using useState to track currentPage. Render components conditionally based on currentPage state (Home, Login, Register, StudentDashboard, RecruiterDashboard, AdminDashboard, Search, Assessment, Applications).
Add custom CSS variables for the blue-to-indigo gradient theme (--color-primary-blue: #3B82F6, --color-primary-indigo: #6366F1) and utility classes for gradient backgrounds.
Extend Tailwind config with custom colors (primaryBlue: #3B82F6, primaryIndigo: #6366F1, success: #10B981, warning: #F59E0B, danger: #EF4444, bgLight: #F9FAFB) and gradient utilities.

requirements.summary: Implement responsive Navbar with mobile hamburger menu, conditional user display, and logout functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar renders on all pages.
Hamburger icon appears on screens narrower than md breakpoint and toggles the nav links.
Logged-in user's name and role are displayed.
Logout clears auth state and returns user to Home.

file_operations.description: Create responsive Navbar component with links (Home, Login, Register), mobile hamburger menu toggling via useState, user name/role display when authenticated, and Logout button that calls AuthContext logout and navigates to Home. Wire the generated logo image at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-icon.dim_128x128.png.
Import and render Navbar component above page content, passing setCurrentPage navigation function as prop.

requirements.summary: Build Home page with hero section (tagline, CTA buttons, gradient background) and Features section highlighting platform benefits
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays the exact tagline and both CTA buttons.
'Find Internships' navigates to the Search Internships page.
'Hire Talent' navigates to the Register page pre-selected on the Recruiter tab.
Features section shows at least 4 benefit cards.
Hero background uses the blue-to-indigo gradient.

file_operations.description: Create Home page with hero section (tagline 'Bridge the Gap Between Skills and Opportunities', CTA buttons 'Find Internships' and 'Hire Talent' navigating to Search and Register pages respectively, blue-to-indigo gradient background using the generated hero image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1440x600.png) and Features section with 4+ benefit cards (skill verification, smart matching, easy applications, admin oversight).
Add Home page route to state-based navigation, rendering Home component when currentPage is 'home'.

requirements.summary: Build Login page with Student/Recruiter and Admin tabs, localStorage authentication, role-based redirects, and error handling
acceptanceCriteria: Two tabs switch between Student/Recruiter login and Admin login forms.
Successful student login saves currentUser with role 'student' and redirects to /student-dashboard.
Successful recruiter login saves currentUser with role 'recruiter' and redirects to /recruiter-dashboard.
Admin login with admin/admin saves currentUser with role 'admin' and redirects to /admin-dashboard.
Wrong credentials display a visible error message without page reload.

file_operations.description: Create Login page with two tabs: (1) Student/Recruiter login form (email + password, checks localStorage 'internbridge_students' and 'internbridge_recruiters'); (2) Admin login form (username + password, hardcoded admin/admin). On success, call AuthContext login with user data and navigate to appropriate dashboard. Display inline error messages for invalid credentials.
Add Login page route to state-based navigation.

requirements.summary: Build Register page with Student and Recruiter tabs, comprehensive form fields, file-to-base64 conversion, localStorage storage with initial verification status, validation, and post-registration redirect
acceptanceCriteria: Student and Recruiter registration tabs are independently functional.
All listed fields are present with correct input types.
Photo and Resume files are converted to base64 before storage.
Validation prevents submission with missing required fields.
New student record includes verified: false, verificationStatus: 'pending', assessments: [], certificates: [].
New recruiter record includes verified: false, verificationStatus: 'pending'.
Redirect to Login page after successful registration.

file_operations.description: Create Register page with Student and Recruiter tabs. Student form: Name, DOB (date), Gender (radio), Email, Mobile, Password, ID Proof (select), Skills (checkboxes: EXCEL, Power BI, SQL, Python), Photo (file→base64), Resume (file→base64). On submit, append to localStorage 'internbridge_students' with {verified: false, verificationStatus: 'pending', assessments: [], certificates: []}. Recruiter form: Name, Email, Phone, Password, Company Name, Owner Name, Owner ID Proof (select), DIN Number, CIN Number, Address (textarea). On submit, append to 'internbridge_recruiters' with {verified: false, verificationStatus: 'pending'}. Include validation and redirect to Login after registration.
Create utility functions for converting File objects to base64 strings for localStorage storage.
Add Register page route to state-based navigation, supporting optional recruiterTab query parameter to pre-select Recruiter tab when navigating from Home 'Hire Talent' CTA.

requirements.summary: Build Student Dashboard with protected route, responsive sidebar navigation, Profile/Skills/Documents/Assessment/Search/Applications sections, and certificate upload
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated access redirects to Login.
Sidebar renders on desktop; collapses to tab bar on mobile.
Profile section shows photo and all student fields with working Edit mode.
Skills section shows correct badge per verification status.
Certificate upload converts file to base64 and appends to student's certificates array in localStorage.
My Applications shows all applications for the current student with colored status badges.

file_operations.description: Create StudentDashboard as protected route (redirect to Login if not role='student'). Implement responsive sidebar navigation (desktop sidebar, mobile tabs) with sections: (1) Profile - display/edit name/mobile/skills, show photo; (2) Skills - list with verification badge (yellow unverified, green verified); (3) Documents - show resume, ID proof, certificate upload (file→base64→append to certificates[]); (4) Skill Assessment - button to navigate to Assessment page; (5) Search Internships - button to navigate to Search page; (6) My Applications - list student's applications from 'internbridge_applications' with status badges.
Add StudentDashboard route with authentication guard checking AuthContext currentUser role.

requirements.summary: Build Recruiter Dashboard with protected route, sidebar navigation, Company Profile/Verification Status/Post Internship/My Postings/Application Management sections
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated access redirects to Login.
Post Internship form saves correctly to localStorage with recruiterId and postedDate.
My Internship Postings lists only this recruiter's internships.
Application Management lists applicants per internship with current status.
Status changes persist immediately to localStorage.

file_operations.description: Create RecruiterDashboard as protected route (redirect to Login if not role='recruiter'). Sidebar navigation with sections: (1) Company Profile - display company info; (2) Verification Status - badge (gold/green if verified, else pending); (3) Post Internship - form (Company Name auto-filled, Designation, Duration, Stipend, Work Type select, Skills Required checkboxes, Description), saves to 'internbridge_internships'; (4) My Internship Postings - list recruiter's internships; (5) Application Management - list applicants per internship with status dropdown (Applied→Under Review→Accepted/Rejected), persist changes to 'internbridge_applications'.
Add RecruiterDashboard route with authentication guard checking AuthContext currentUser role.

requirements.summary: Build Admin Dashboard with protected route, Students/Recruiters/Documents tabs, verification action buttons, and immediate localStorage persistence
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only access; other roles are redirected.
Students tab shows all students with correct current verification status.
Verify/Reject/Request More Info buttons update the student/recruiter record in localStorage.
Recruiters tab mirrors Student tab functionality for recruiter records.
Documents tab lists all file uploads with status controls.

file_operations.description: Create AdminDashboard as protected route (redirect to Login if not role='admin'). Three tabs: (1) Students - table with Name, Email, Skills, Verification Status, action buttons (Verify sets verified:true/verificationStatus:'verified', Reject sets verificationStatus:'rejected', Request More Info sets verificationStatus:'more_info'); (2) Recruiters - table with Company Name, Name, Email, Verification Status, same action buttons; (3) Documents - list all uploaded documents (photos, resumes, certificates) with status (Pending/Approved/Rejected/Need More Info) and action buttons. All changes persist to localStorage immediately.
Add AdminDashboard route with authentication guard checking AuthContext currentUser role.

requirements.summary: Build Search Internships page with real-time filtering, Apply button for authenticated students, duplicate prevention, and Work Type/skill badge rendering
acceptanceCriteria: All internships from localStorage are displayed by default.
Search bar filters cards in real-time across designation, company, skills, and description fields.
Apply button is visible only to authenticated students.
Applying creates a correct record in 'internbridge_applications'.
Duplicate application attempts show an error or are blocked.
Work Type and skill tags render as styled badges/pills.

file_operations.description: Create SearchInternships page accessible to all. Display all internships from 'internbridge_internships'. Include search bar filtering in real-time by designation, company name, skills, description. Each InternshipCard shows Company Name, Designation, Duration, Stipend, Work Type badge, Skills tags, Apply button (only for logged-in students). On Apply, create record in 'internbridge_applications' {id, internshipId, studentId, studentName, companyName, designation, appliedDate, status:'applied'}, show toast confirmation, prevent duplicate applications.
Add SearchInternships page route to state-based navigation.

requirements.summary: Build Assessment page with skill selector, 5 hardcoded MCQs per skill, score calculation, result persistence to student's assessments array, and retake capability
acceptanceCriteria: Each of the 4 skills (Excel, SQL, Power BI, Python) has exactly 5 distinct MCQ questions.
Score is calculated correctly out of 5.
Result is saved to the logged-in student's assessments array in localStorage.
Result summary (test name, score, date) is displayed after submission.
User can retake a different or same assessment.

file_operations.description: Create Assessment page with skill selector (Excel, SQL, Power BI, Python). For selected skill, display 5 hardcoded MCQ questions. On submit, calculate score (X/5), save to current student's assessments array in 'internbridge_students' localStorage {testName, score, date}, display result summary. Allow retaking assessments.
Create hardcoded assessment questions data structure with 5 MCQ questions each for Excel, SQL, Power BI, and Python skills, including correct answers.
Add Assessment page route to state-based navigation.

requirements.summary: Build Applications page with role-based views: student application list with colored status badges, recruiter application management with status controls
acceptanceCriteria: Student view lists only the current student's applications.
Status badges use the correct specified colors.
Recruiter view groups applications by internship with status update controls.
Status changes by recruiter persist to localStorage.

file_operations.description: Create Applications page with role-based rendering: For students, display all their applications from 'internbridge_applications' showing Internship Title, Company Name, Applied Date, colored status badge (Applied-blue, Under Review-yellow, Accepted-green, Rejected-red). For recruiters, show application management view (list applicants per internship with status change controls, same as Recruiter Dashboard Application Management section).
Add Applications page route to state-based navigation.

requirements.summary: Seed localStorage with sample students, recruiters, internships, and applications on first load when keys are absent
acceptanceCriteria: On first load with empty localStorage, all four keys are populated with seed data.
Seed is not re-applied if keys already exist.
Seed students include one with verified:true/verificationStatus:'verified' and one with verificationStatus:'pending'.
Seed internships are linked to the verified recruiter's id.
Sample applications reference valid seed student and internship ids.

file_operations.description: Create seed data utility that checks if localStorage keys ('internbridge_students', 'internbridge_recruiters', 'internbridge_internships', 'internbridge_applications') are absent. If absent, populate with: 2 sample students (one verified, one pending), 2 sample recruiters (one verified, one pending), 3 sample internships linked to verified recruiter, 2+ sample applications with valid references.
Import and invoke seedData utility in useEffect on component mount to ensure first-load seeding.

requirements.summary: Implement reusable UI components: Badge, StatusPill, Toast, Confirmation Modal, InternshipCard with mobile-first responsive design
acceptanceCriteria: Badge component renders the correct icon, text, and color for each variant.
StatusPill applies the four specified application status colors.
Toast appears and auto-dismisses after ~3 seconds.
Confirmation Modal is reusable and accepts a message and onConfirm callback.
InternshipCard is responsive: single column on mobile, grid on md+ screens.

file_operations.description: Create Badge component rendering variants: Verified ✓ (green #10B981), Pending ⏳ (yellow #F59E0B), Rejected ✗ (red #EF4444), More Info (blue #3B82F6) with appropriate icons, text, and Tailwind styling.
Create StatusPill component for application statuses: Applied (blue #3B82F6), Under Review (yellow #F59E0B), Accepted (green #10B981), Rejected (red #EF4444).
Create Toast notification component that appears at bottom-right, displays a message, and auto-dismisses after ~3 seconds. Include useToast hook for global toast management.
Create reusable ConfirmationModal component accepting message prop and onConfirm callback for destructive actions.

Create InternshipCard component for Search page displaying Company Name, Designation, Duration, Stipend, Work Type badge, Skills tags, Apply button. Mobile-first responsive: stack vertically on mobile, grid layout on md+ screens.

requirements.summary: Apply polished professional visual theme with specified color palette, typography hierarchy, and modern trustworthy layout
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section has a blue-to-indigo gradient background.
Dashboard backgrounds use #F9FAFB.
All verified badges are green, pending are yellow, rejected are red.
Typography hierarchy is visually clear on all screen sizes.
Overall design looks professional and consistent across all pages.

file_operations.description: Enhance global styles with blue-to-indigo gradient utilities, typography hierarchy (large headings for hero, medium for section titles, small for card metadata), and light gray (#F9FAFB) background classes for dashboard content areas.

Ensure Tailwind config includes all theme colors (primaryBlue #3B82F6, primaryIndigo #6366F1, success #10B981, warning #F59E0B, danger #EF4444, bgLight #F9FAFB) and responsive breakpoints for mobile-first design.
